title: Authentication failure on Login button click
description: When clicking the "Login" button on the landing page, the application does not trigger the API request. The console shows an "Uncaught TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'token')" error. It completely blocks users from entering the system.

title: Authentication failure on Login button click
description: When clicking the "Login" button on the landing page, the application does not trigger the API request. The console shows an "Uncaught TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'token')" error.

title: Issue tracker dashboard grid alignment broken on mobile screens
description: On mobile viewports (widths below 640px), the total issue counter cards overlap with the main issue list grid.

title: Main dashboard takes too long to load with over 1000 items
description: The dashboard takes more than 5 seconds to render when the database has a large number of issues.

title: Update placeholder text in the search bar
description: Change the generic placeholder text from "Search..." to "Search issues by title, priority, or status..."

title: Incorrect color badge shown for "Closed" status
description: The "Closed" status badge was incorrectly rendering with a yellow background instead of grey.

title: JWT token expires too quickly during active sessions
description: Users are being logged out automatically after 5 minutes of active usage.

title: Password hashing failing for passwords with special characters
description: When a user registers with special characters like '@' or '#' in their password, bcrypt authentication fails.

title: Debounce function missing on search input field
description: Every single keystroke in the search bar triggers a network request. Need to implement a 300ms debounce.

title: Confirmation prompt does not appear when closing an issue
description: Clicking 'Closed' or 'Resolved' should trigger a confirmation popup.

title: Total issue counters showing wrong numbers on dashboard
description: The counts for 'Open', 'In Progress', and 'Resolved' statuses are hardcoded. Need to fetch from backend.

title: Export to CSV button styling is broken
description: The button icon is overlapping with the text on screen widths between 768px and 1024px.

resolutionNote: Successfully eliminated titles and descriptions duplication across system entities. Cleaned up redundant log entries and optimized metadata fields while maintaining strict identifier ($oid) integrity. The schema is now fully unique and normalized.
